\tzpentry{ID3567}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3567 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ f(\theta)=2\Omega\sin\phi_{\rm lat}=2\Omega\cos\theta, \]
